heading: Waiver of discriminatory purchasing requirements with respect to purchases of civil aircraft
label: 2513 Waiver of discriminatory purchasing requirements with respect to purchases of civil aircraft
text: The President may waive the application of the provisions of chapter 83 of title 41 in the case of any procurement of civil aircraft and related articles of a country or instrumentality which is a party to the Agreement on Trade in Civil Aircraft referred to in and approved under . The President may modify or withdraw any waiver granted pursuant to this section.section 2503(c) of this titlesection 2503(a) of this title
